name: fix-esp-registry-vendor-example-path
title: bugfix: fix ESP registry vendor example path
description: Fix ESP registry release validation failure caused by a stale vendor example path in the build selector config.
creator: magicdian
notes: Release 2605.3.2 ESP validation failed because the selected vendor example path referenced removed esp_wiremux_console_demo. The package generator includes beginner, advanced, and professional examples.
